commands.review_summary:
The PR classifies Vercel Git authorization statuses as external action-required blockers, excludes those blockers from failed-check repair reasons, and distinguishes Codex execution-mode preflight failures.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level with high confidence: a Vercel authorization StatusContext reported as FAILURE currently enters the generic terminal-failure path and is accepted as a repairable failed check. The PR body also identifies a concrete occurrence at https://github.com/openclaw/clawhub/pull/2571.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The contributor must supply real after-fix behavior proof; no mechanical code repair is currently identified for ClawSweeper to perform.

target.title: fix: classify Vercel authorization blockers
target.body:
## Summary
- classify Vercel git authorization status contexts as external ACTION_REQUIRED blockers
- keep external action-required checks out of the repairable failed-check list so automerge does not dispatch a Codex write repair for them
- classify Codex preflight output that asks for execution mode as codex_execution_mode_unavailable instead of generic codex_unavailable

## Evidence
- openclaw/clawhub#2571 had a failing StatusContext named `Vercel – clawhub` with targetUrl `https://vercel.com/git/authorize?...`
- ClawSweeper treated that as repairable check failure and launched Codex repair
- Codex write preflight then returned: `I can’t create files in this mode. Please switch to execution mode...`

## Tests
- `PATH=/Users/mauriceniu/.cache/codex-runtimes/codex-primary-runtime/dependencies/node/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/opt/homebrew/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/System/Cryptexes/App/usr/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/var/run/com.apple.security.cryptexd/codex.system/bootstrap/usr/local/bin:/var/run/com.apple.security.cryptexd/codex.system/bootstrap/usr/bin:/var/run/com.apple.security.cryptexd/codex.system/bootstrap/usr/appleinternal/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.codex/tmp/arg0/codex-arg0OcfgVg:/Users/mauriceniu/.bun/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.codebuddy/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.nvm/versions/node/v20.20.2/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.local/state/fnm_multishells/85856_1780990594480/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.local/bin:/Applications/Codex.app/Contents/Resources pnpm run build:repair`
- `PATH=/Users/mauriceniu/.cache/codex-runtimes/codex-primary-runtime/dependencies/node/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/opt/homebrew/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/System/Cryptexes/App/usr/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/var/run/com.apple.security.cryptexd/codex.system/bootstrap/usr/local/bin:/var/run/com.apple.security.cryptexd/codex.system/bootstrap/usr/bin:/var/run/com.apple.security.cryptexd/codex.system/bootstrap/usr/appleinternal/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.codex/tmp/arg0/codex-arg0OcfgVg:/Users/mauriceniu/.bun/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.codebuddy/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.nvm/versions/node/v20.20.2/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.local/state/fnm_multishells/85856_1780990594480/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.local/bin:/Applications/Codex.app/Contents/Resources pnpm exec oxlint src/repair/comment-router-utils.ts src/repair/comment-router-core.ts src/repair/execute-fix-artifact.ts test/repair/comment-router-utils.test.ts test/repair/comment-router-core.test.ts --deny-warnings --report-unused-disable-directives -D correctness`
- `PATH=/Users/mauriceniu/.cache/codex-runtimes/codex-primary-runtime/dependencies/node/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/opt/homebrew/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/System/Cryptexes/App/usr/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/var/run/com.apple.security.cryptexd/codex.system/bootstrap/usr/local/bin:/var/run/com.apple.security.cryptexd/codex.system/bootstrap/usr/bin:/var/run/com.apple.security.cryptexd/codex.system/bootstrap/usr/appleinternal/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.codex/tmp/arg0/codex-arg0OcfgVg:/Users/mauriceniu/.bun/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.codebuddy/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.nvm/versions/node/v20.20.2/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.local/state/fnm_multishells/85856_1780990594480/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.local/bin:/Applications/Codex.app/Contents/Resources node --test test/repair/comment-router-utils.test.ts test/repair/comment-router-core.test.ts`
- `PATH=/Users/mauriceniu/.cache/codex-runtimes/codex-primary-runtime/dependencies/node/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/opt/homebrew/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/System/Cryptexes/App/usr/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/var/run/com.apple.security.cryptexd/codex.system/bootstrap/usr/local/bin:/var/run/com.apple.security.cryptexd/codex.system/bootstrap/usr/bin:/var/run/com.apple.security.cryptexd/codex.system/bootstrap/usr/appleinternal/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.codex/tmp/arg0/codex-arg0OcfgVg:/Users/mauriceniu/.bun/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.codebuddy/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.nvm/versions/node/v20.20.2/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.local/state/fnm_multishells/85856_1780990594480/bin:/Users/mauriceniu/.local/bin:/Applications/Codex.app/Contents/Resources GIT_CONFIG_COUNT=1 GIT_CONFIG_KEY_0=commit.gpgsign GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_0=false pnpm run test:repair`

Note: the first full `pnpm run test:repair` failed because local Git commit signing tried to unlock `~/.ssh/id_ed25519_signing` inside temporary test repos. Re-running with commit signing disabled for the test subprocess passed: 487/487.
